title: Ventura County Commercial TI — Group B, plumbing fixture count omitted
notes: PLUMB-FIXTURES should fail; everything else passes. Tests fixture-count rule in Ventura context.
plan_text:
PROJECT DATA - 1290 ESPLANADE DR STE 110, VENTURA COUNTY (OXNARD area)
TENANT IMPROVEMENT
A-0.1
Occupancy Group: B
Construction Type: II-B (existing shell)
Number of stories: 1 (TI on 2nd floor of existing)
Building height: existing
Tenant area: 5,100 sf
Fully sprinklered: yes (existing NFPA 13)
Design occupant load: 51
IECC: Title 24 Part 6
Electrical service: 200 A subpanel
EXIT 1, EXIT 2 corridors
NFPA 72 fire alarm tie-in. No commercial kitchen. No atrium.
Plumbing fixture count not stated on plans.

ground_truth.rationale: Fixture counts not stated: the engine cannot verify a shortfall it cannot see — needs-review correction (provide fixture calc), same trust-preserving posture as occupant load
